description: End-to-end gate for the open-vocab rebuild (WP-I). Typing the Beeliar address into the app must return a real result set, not warnings. The 'expected' block is the acceptance contract; the 'recorded' block is filled from a real verification run on prod and then 'status' flips to 'verified'.
address_note: Proxy for '3 BLACK SWAN RISE BEELIAR' which is missing from G-NAF.
